metadata.purpose: Define which pipeline parameters must come from the user, which are optional, which should be researched by local subagents, and which should be weighted at runtime.
metadata.core_policy: The repository provides schemas, evidence rules, and routing contracts. It does not hard-code concrete skill requirements, external display requirements, or universal weights for every discipline.

parameter_ownership_groups.description: User-owned facts that should be requested once if they cannot be extracted from the user's materials.
parameter_ownership_groups.question_policy: Ask in one compact batch. The user may provide partial answers.

fields.why_needed: Needed to classify discipline, stage, resume education section, and school-signal research.
Needed to decide whether to run resume-only, internship analysis, full-time analysis, or concrete JD matching.
Needed only when generating a user-authorized resume draft.
Needed to avoid fabricating abilities and to create evidence-backed resume sections.

parameter_ownership_groups.description: Useful facts that improve targeting but should not cause repeated questioning.
parameter_ownership_groups.question_policy: Ask only if the active task clearly benefits. Otherwise mark missing and continue.

parameter_ownership_groups.description: Information that should be investigated by local subagents on the user's device from allowed public and official sources.
parameter_ownership_groups.question_policy: Do not ask the user to manually provide these unless they already have a source they want to use.

fields.note: The repository does not decide concrete skill weights for a role.
The repository does not force GitHub, personal websites, portfolios, or papers across all disciplines.
Partnership claims require official or primary evidence.

sources: social media as weak auxiliary signal
fields.note: Used as context, not as proof of a specific role requirement.

parameter_ownership_groups.description: Weights that should be set by downstream agents at runtime after reading user facts and current sources.
parameter_ownership_groups.question_policy: Do not ask the user to choose weights unless the user explicitly wants manual control.

minimal_one_round_question_template.purpose: Reduce user interruption when materials are incomplete.
minimal_one_round_question_template.template: 我已经从你提供的材料里整理出了现有信息。为了继续生成更准的简历或投递方向，请一次性补充下面能提供的内容：学校/专业/年级或毕业时间、当前想找实习还是全职、目标岗位或方向、1-3段最重要的项目/实习/竞赛经历、可以公开展示的链接、联系方式。如果暂时不想补充，我可以在你明确同意后只基于已有信息生成不完整简历，但不会提供投递方向建议。

incomplete_resume_policy.required_warning: 信息不完整时只能生成事实草稿，不能做针对性岗位推荐。详细信息越充分，简历和投递建议才越准。
